name: Far East Consortium International Limited
summary: Far East Consortium International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment, hotel operations and management, car park operations and facilities management, gaming operations and management, and treasury management businesses. It develops a portfolio of residential properties; invests in retail and office buildings; and operates hotels. The company also operates third party and self-owned car parks; and owns and operates casinos and gaming facilities. In addition, it provides loan financing, sales agency, mortgage, administration and management, vault, and hotel management and consultancy services, as well as engages in the securities and financial investment activities. As of March 31, 2020, the company owned and operated 31 hotels with approximately 8,100 rooms; and managed 470 car parks with approximately 106,696 car parking bays. It has operations in Australia, New Zealand, the Czech Republic, Hong Kong, Malaysia, the People's Republic of China, Singapore, the United Kingdom, and the rest of Europe. The company is based in Central, Hong Kong.
